transcript.text:
[Tzuyang's weight reveal for the very first time]
[Well..?]
48.6kg (Around 107 lbs)
[The Law of Conservation of Mass Experiment]
[700g of sirloin, 300g of tenderloin, 1kg of pork jowl, 1kg of pork belly]
[Total of 3kg]
[What will happen to Tzuyang's body if she consumes 3kg of meat]
Hello everyone~
Today,
I will be doing something that was very high in demand
"Does your weight go up as you eat?"
I was curious too, so [She's sitting on a scale]
I'm at 48kg
3kg of meat over here
Let's see how much weight I will gain while I eat
I drank some water just now and it already went up

The meat will not be exactly 3kg after they're cooked because of the grease
But I drink a lot of beverage on the side
Let's get it started
Let's try 1
So good
Oh what!? I'm already at 49kg
[Goes down as she puts the drink down]
Is it because of the chopsticks?
It slightly went up
That was fast
I couldn't eat much before this mukbang for my weight reveal
And I think that's why it tastes even better
[Mukbang on a scale]
[Currently gained about 0.3kg]
I'll put some pork belly here too
That looks good Sirloin~

Tasty
It feels like I'm gaining more than I eat
[Gained 0.8kg, meat grilling, Lost 0.8kg)
How come?
I like the fatty part of the meat This one has a lot
Beef is good, but the pork belly is tasting amazing
Yum
[Finishing up the rest of the pork belly]
Let's cook some pork jowl now
It's hot in here
What?
I gained 1kg
Don't get burnt
49.8...?
I'm not at 50 yet
Is there a robot that cooks meat for you?

There should be 1
[Almost at 50kg!]
I'm over 50 now
[Moving the cooked pork jowl]
Before we grill the beef
We need to prepare
Why so small?
Amazing
It won't be good if it's cooked well-done
[New batch right away]
[Professional KBBQ griller]
I can go on a show for this
Almost at 51
[Almost at 51kg]
Already at 51
I feel more digested than before

Does that not matter?
I think I can get to 52kg
I want to show you guys the process of me lose the weight too
Then I would have to sit on this scale for like 10 hours
That's pretty difficult
I gained 3kg!
3kg is pretty heavy, no?
You can definitely feel 3kg
But if that's in my stomach..
Won't I feel that weight?
My stomach will struggle
Do I need to start eating less?
Last one
I will eat the bones too For the accuracy
[Almost at 52kg]
It's over 52kg

Amazing
So delicious
That's so precise
I gained more
[Gained a total of 4kg]
[Her weight went from 48.6kg to 52.6kg]
To be exact
I was at around 48.6kg
So 49, 50, 51, 52
I gained 4kg
I ate 3kg of meat
And drank 1.5L of beverage
That whole bottle
4.5kg total, but I'd assume the 500 gram is the grease that was lost from the meat
That's pretty accurate
That's so cool

I have a normal body
Really normal
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
